deviceIp.title: Device IP (firmware)
deviceIp.description: IP stored in device flash (R101/W101). Takes effect after device reboot.

devicePortOffset.title: Device Port Offset (firmware)
devicePortOffset.description: Listen-port offset stored in device flash (R102/W102). Effective device port = 8500 + offset. Takes effect after device reboot.

netmask.title: Netmask (firmware)
netmask.description: Subnet mask stored in device flash (R103/W103).

gateway.title: Gateway (firmware)
gateway.description: Default gateway stored in device flash (R104/W104).

mac.title: MAC Address (firmware)
mac.description: MAC address stored in device flash (R105/W105). Format: hex octets separated by colons.

uart0Baud.title: UART0 Baud (firmware)
uart0Baud.description: USART2 baud rate stored in device flash (R106.0/W106.0). Common values: 9600, 19200, 38400, 57600, 115200.

uart1Baud.title: UART1 Baud (firmware)
uart1Baud.description: UART5 baud rate stored in device flash (R106.1/W106.1). Common values: 9600, 19200, 38400, 57600, 115200.
